title: centaurea brevis
intro: Centaurea brevis is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae), characterized by its annual or biennial growth habit and small, yellow or white flowers. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. Centaurea brevis has been traditionally used to promote digestive health, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy. The plant can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal benefits.
